_comment: Copy to benchmarks/.private-map.json (GITIGNORED — never commit). 'deny' is every private string that must NOT appear in committed benchmarks/ (repo names, org, author name/email, codenames); check-opsec.sh greps for these. 'repos' maps public labels to private repos + pinned SHAs. Only the public 'label' may ever appear in committed files.

Public.private: pigeon (this repo) or a permissive-OSS project
Public.label: the reproducible public repo whose number is the headline
